summary: Adapted the Narada architect shortcut to use a local Narada proper agent-start carrier modeled on the working narada-andrey command shape. The shortcut carrier now delegates to node tools/agent-start/start-agent.mjs narada.architect --runtime codex --exec after verifying the launch intent sequence and request. Dry-run/no-launch verification passed without importing User Site runtime state.
residuals: Exact Codex resume binding and operator-surface runtime binding remain separate future admissions.
